trivia_bullets.text: Union Force (DBS-B02) is the second booster set for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released November 3, 2017. The set's green-color archetype centers on the Android Cell Saga, with BT2-077 Vegeta tagged 'Saiyan / Android Cell Saga' in Bandai's official database. [dbs-cardgame.com: Union Force card list]

BT2-077 is a green Battle card costing 2 energy (1 Green), with 15000 Power and 5000 Combo Power. Its On Play skill lets the controlling player KO any number of opponent Battle Cards with combined energy cost 3 or less — a board-clearing tempo play designed for the green aggro-control archetype of the Android Cell Saga. [TrollAndToad / Shuffle n Cut product listings citing Bandai card data]
sources: TrollAndToad: Vegeta BT2-077 Union Force listing
Shuffle n Cut: BT2-077 product page

trivia_bullets.text: The Android Cell Saga framing places this Vegeta print within the period when Vegeta allowed himself to become a laboratory subject of Dr. Gero's androids and later Cell, training to reach Super Saiyan 2 in the hyperbolic time chamber. This is the same saga that produced his 'Full Power' print (BT2-076), the card immediately preceding BT2-077 in the set list — a back-to-back Vegeta pairing that Bandai likely designed intentionally for the Cell Saga green-color narrative. [Dragon Ball Wiki: Android Cell Saga, via WebSearch]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: Cell Saga (via WebSearch)
